root_text.an5.10:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu agāravo appatisso abhabbo imasmiṁ dhammavinaye vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjituṁ.
root_text.an5.10:1.3: Assaddho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu agāravo appatisso abhabbo imasmiṁ dhammavinaye vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjituṁ.
root_text.an5.10:1.4: Ahiriko, bhikkhave, bhikkhu agāravo appatisso abhabbo imasmiṁ dhammavinaye vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjituṁ.
root_text.an5.10:1.5: Anottappī, bhikkhave, bhikkhu agāravo appatisso abhabbo imasmiṁ dhammavinaye vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjituṁ.
root_text.an5.10:1.6: Kusīto, bhikkhave, bhikkhu agāravo appatisso abhabbo imasmiṁ dhammavinaye vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjituṁ.
root_text.an5.10:1.7: Duppañño, bhikkhave, bhikkhu agāravo appatisso abhabbo imasmiṁ dhammavinaye vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjituṁ.
root_text.an5.10:1.8: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu agāravo appatisso abhabbo imasmiṁ dhammavinaye vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjituṁ.
root_text.an5.10:2.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu sagāravo sappatisso bhabbo imasmiṁ dhammavinaye vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjituṁ.
root_text.an5.10:2.3: Saddho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sagāravo sappatisso bhabbo imasmiṁ dhammavinaye vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjituṁ.
root_text.an5.10:2.4: Hirīmā, bhikkhave, bhikkhu …pe… ottappī, bhikkhave, bhikkhu …pe… āraddhavīriyo, bhikkhave, bhikkhu …pe… paññavā, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sagāravo sappatisso bhabbo imasmiṁ dhammavinaye vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjituṁ.
root_text.an5.10:2.5: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu sagāravo sappatisso bhabbo imasmiṁ dhammavinaye vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjitun”ti.

translation_text.an5.10:1.1: “Mendicants, a disrespectful and irreverent mendicant with five qualities can’t achieve growth, improvement, or maturity in this teaching and training.
translation_text.an5.10:1.3: A disrespectful and irreverent mendicant who is faithless …
translation_text.an5.10:1.7: witless can’t achieve growth, improvement, or maturity in this teaching and training.
translation_text.an5.10:1.8: A disrespectful and irreverent mendicant with these five qualities can’t achieve growth, improvement, or maturity in this teaching and training.
translation_text.an5.10:2.1: A respectful and reverent mendicant with five qualities can achieve growth, improvement, and maturity in this teaching and training.
translation_text.an5.10:2.3: A respectful and reverent mendicant who is faithful …
translation_text.an5.10:2.4: conscientious … prudent … energetic … wise can achieve growth, improvement, and maturity in this teaching and training.
translation_text.an5.10:2.5: A respectful and reverent mendicant with these five qualities can achieve growth, improvement, and maturity in this teaching and training.”

reference_text.an5.10:2.1: csp1ed16.8, csp2ed16.8, dr22.10, ms16A5_39, ndp17.280, pts-vp-pli3.9
